category_sources: source_facts.description says rule-based tunnel in Go formerly known as ClashMeta; source_facts.homepage is the official mihomo docs site.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a rule-based tunnel in Go; source_facts.executables lists the mihomo CLI.
